question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/ParserProperties.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: getBatch().getFlushInterval()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the flushInterval=2s combined with the queueCapacity=10 to cause a scenario where 10 files accumulate in the queue during a 2-second window, then all flush simultaneously, causing a spike in database write load that exhausts connections and causes a non-network-based DoS?
